integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to rename the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with GUI elements like context menus, dialog boxes, or text fields rather than command-line interfaces.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the application UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual reference management software or OS file explorer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The renaming process occurs within a genuine application interface (e.g., Zotero, Juris-M, or the OS file manager), not a text editor or mock environment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The parent case is 'Marbury v. Madison'. The initial attachment filename is 'scan_generic.pdf'. The final renamed attachment must include both 'Marbury' and '1803' in its filename.
